title: Qatar Will Remain Reliable Energy Supplier To India: Energy Minister Tells Puri
description: In line with the government’s pre-emptive steps, ONGC chairman and CEO Arun Kumar Singh, on Friday, also said that as the world scrambles to recover from the biggest energy shock in decades triggered by the West Asia conflict, India should be cautious about relying on traditional supply assumptions, particularly its proximity to the Middle East for sourcing oil and gas
